message:
chore: migrate to golangci-lint v2, fix warnSSHInsteadOfRules call site

- .golangci.yml: rewrite to v2 format (version: "2", formatters section,
  restructured exclusions), drop gosimple (absorbed by staticcheck in v2)
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: bump golangci-lint-action v6 → v9
- runner.go: wire up warnSSHInsteadOfRules() call when SSH creds are not
  forwarded (the function was added in #29 but never called)
- image_manager_test.go: use tagged switch per staticcheck QF1003

Inspired by PR #25 from AlexEdgcomb.

files.patch:
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ jobs:
           go-version: '1.23'
 
       - name: golangci-lint
-        uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v6
+        uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v9
         with:
           version: latest

@@ -1,39 +1,58 @@
+version: "2"
+
 run:
   timeout: 5m
 
 linters:
   enable:
     - errcheck
-    - gosimple
     - govet
     - staticcheck
     - unused
-    - gofmt
     - misspell
+  exclusions:
+    generated: lax
+    presets:
+      - comments
+      - common-false-positives
+      - legacy
+      - std-error-handling
+    rules:
+      # Ignore planned TUI implementation that will be integrated later
+      - path: pkg/config/config.go
+        linters:
+          - unused
+      # Ignore unused test infrastructure
+      - path: cmd/watch.go
+        linters:
+          - unused
+      - path: pkg/runner/image_manager_test.go
+        linters:
+          - unused
+      - path: pkg/runner/lifecycle_executor_test.go
+        linters:
+          - unused
+      - path: pkg/runner/registry_check_test.go
+        linters:
+          - unused
+      # Ignore planned feature implementations
+      - text: "checkAndNotifyAboutUpdates.*is unused"
+        linters:
+          - unused
+      - text: "getLocalImageInfo.*is unused"
+        linters:
+          - unused
+    paths:
+      - third_party$
+      - builtin$
+      - examples$
 
-issues:
-  exclude-rules:
-    # Ignore planned TUI implementation that will be integrated later
-    - path: pkg/config/config.go
-      linters:
-        - unused
-    # Ignore unused test infrastructure
-    - path: cmd/watch.go
-      linters:
-        - unused
-    - path: pkg/runner/image_manager_test.go
-      linters:
-        - unused
-    - path: pkg/runner/lifecycle_executor_test.go
-      linters:
-        - unused
-    - path: pkg/runner/registry_check_test.go
-      linters:
-        - unused
-    # Ignore planned feature implementations
-    - text: "checkAndNotifyAboutUpdates.*is unused"
-      linters:
-        - unused
-    - text: "getLocalImageInfo.*is unused"
-      linters:
-        - unused
\ No newline at end of file
+formatters:
+  enable:
+    - gofmt
+  exclusions:
+    generated: lax
+    paths:
+      - third_party$
+      - builtin$
+      - examples$
